heading: Definitions
label: 1441a–1 Definitions
notes: References in TextThe Housing and Urban Development Act of 1968, referred to in par. (2), is , , . Title IX of the Housing and Urban Development Act of 1968 is classified principally to chapter 49 (§ 3931 et seq.) of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title of 1968 Amendment note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 90–44882 Stat. 476section 1701 of this titleAug. 1, 1968
CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Financial Institutions Reform, Recovery, and Enforcement Act of 1989, and not as part of the Federal Home Loan Bank Act which comprises this chapter.

children.label: A
children.text: serves as an instrumentality of any State or any political subdivision of any State; and

children.label: B
children.text: functions as a source of residential mortgage loan financing in that State.

children.heading: Nonprofit entity
children.label: 2 Nonprofit entity
children.text: The term “nonprofit entity” means any not-for-profit corporation chartered under State law that is exempt from Federal taxation under and no part of the net earnings of which inures to the benefit of any member, founder, contributor, or individual (including any nonprofit entity established by the corporation established under title IX of the Housing and Urban Development Act of 1968 [ et seq.]).section 501(c) of title 2642 U.S.C. 3931

children.label: A
children.text: residential mortgage loans secured by 1- to 4-family or multifamily dwellings; and

children.label: B
children.text: real property improved with 1- to 4-family or multifamily residential dwellings,

children.heading: Net income
children.label: 4 Net income
children.text: The term “net income” means income after deduction of all associated expenses calculated in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles.
